hero.subtitle: Secret Crush creates modern events with a dark premium look, energetic atmosphere, and clear information for every event. Here people can easily review the schedule and reach the ticket button.

yacht.title: Yacht Parties
yacht.description: Perfect section for the main yacht party — with enough space for VIP access and highlights.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Secret Crush organizes modern party events and yacht parties with a dark, luxurious, social-first look. The brand communicates not just events, but a feeling, style, and belonging.
